sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni se smatraju veoma važnim u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones are considered very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ih svaki dan za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use them every day to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ أَيْضًا فِي الْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi uređaji nam također pomažu u traženju informacija na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: These devices also help us search for information on the internet.
